name: Doubao (1st-gen)
archDisplay: Transformer (MoE architecture inferred from ByteDance's later Doubao disclosures; exact 1st-gen configuration undisclosed)
note: ByteDance's debut foundation-model family (pro-4k/32k/128k tiers) launched at Volcano Engine's FORCE conference ~99% below industry pricing; retired in favor of Doubao 1.5/Seed lines.

results.notes: SuperCLUE December 2023 Leaderboard, rank 11/17, listed under the pre-rebrand name '云雀大模型' (Yunque/Doubao's original internal name). Source: CLUEbenchmark/SuperCLUE GitHub README table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: launched May 15 2024 at Volcano Engine's FORCE conference (multiple independent sources), pricing ~99% below industry rates confirmed. FlagEval score 75.96 literally confirmed on the volcengine.com docs page (Chinese text: '综合评分75.96分排名第二...是得分最高的国产大模型' = score 75.96, ranked #2 behind GPT-4, top domestic model) — matches the claimed row exactly.
